  Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" (refactor.rewrite.effect.wrapWithPipe)
  Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleTypeAnnotation)
  Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleLazyConst)

=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepareReuse.ts ---
// refactor: 25:14-25:38, 31:14-31:30
import { Effect, Layer, pipe, Context } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

export const pipe(prepareUser_commentCache) = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provide(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)

export const prepareUserCache = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepareReuse.ts ---
// refactor: 25:14-25:38, 31:14-31:30
import { Effect, Layer, pipe, Context } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

export const prepareUser_commentCache: Layer.Layer<UserRepository, never, DbConnection> = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provide(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)

export const prepareUserCache = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepareReuse.ts ---
// refactor: 25:14-25:38, 31:14-31:30
import { Effect, Layer, pipe, Context } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

export const prepareUser_commentCache = () => pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provide(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)

export const prepareUserCache = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Prepare layers for automatic composition" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepareReuse.ts ---
// refactor: 25:14-25:38, 31:14-31:30
import { Effect, Layer, pipe, Context } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

export const prepareUser_commentCache = [UserRepository.Default, Cache.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<Cache | FileSystem /* UserRepository */>;

export const prepareUserCache = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepareReuse.ts ---
// refactor: 25:14-25:38, 31:14-31:30
import { Effect, Layer, pipe, Context } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

export const prepareUser_commentCache = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provide(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)

export const pipe(prepareUserCache) = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepareReuse.ts ---
// refactor: 25:14-25:38, 31:14-31:30
import { Effect, Layer, pipe, Context } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

export const prepareUser_commentCache = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provide(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)

export const prepareUserCache: Layer.Layer<Cache | UserRepository, never, DbConnection> = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepareReuse.ts ---
// refactor: 25:14-25:38, 31:14-31:30
import { Effect, Layer, pipe, Context } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

export const prepareUser_commentCache = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provide(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)

export const prepareUserCache = () => pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 3: "Prepare layers for automatic composition" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepareReuse.ts ---
// refactor: 25:14-25:38, 31:14-31:30
import { Effect, Layer, pipe, Context } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Context.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class FileSystem extends Context.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  make: Effect.succeed({})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class Cache extends Context.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  make: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}
class UserRepository extends Context.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  make: Effect.as(Effect.andThen(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {
  static Default = Layer.effect(this, this.make)
}

export const prepareUser_commentCache = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provide(Cache.Default),
  Layer.provide(FileSystem.Default)
)

export const prepareUserCache = [UserRepository.Default, Cache.Default, FileSystem.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<FileSystem /* Cache | UserRepository */>;
